topic: A person changing a flat tire on a car.

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Setup (0-2s): Side view of a person kneeling by a car's flat tire; hands on a lug wrench.
Scene 2 — Lift & Loosen (2-5s): Front view of the car; jack is raised; the person loosens lug nuts with steady, controlled motions.
Scene 3 — Replace & Lower (5-8s): Close-up on hands threading lug nuts onto a spare wheel; the car lowers and the person sets the wrench aside.
parsed_generation.narration: Changing a flat tire is a brief roadside safety task. This sequence highlights the solo workflow: stabilize the car, lift with a jack, and swap the wheel. Proper setup and timing let you regain mobility quickly and with minimal risk.

feedback: Strong three-scene sequence with clear timing and shot angles. The narration adds useful safety context and frames the workflow as solo operation. To improve, include a scene showing the wheel removal from the hub and securing the spare, and explicitly call out safety steps such as using proper jack points and wheel chocks.
strengths: Clear, action-first scene progression with concise timing
Narration provides relevant safety context and workflow
fixes: Add a scene showing wheel removal from hub and securing the spare
Add explicit safety notes (jack point placement, wheel chocks, hazard awareness)
